    • 10 — Reporting & Utilities

Batch spatial dimensionality-reduction (cell-type) plots

GenerateSpatialDimMaps.Rd

Loops over group_by_vars and produces Seurat::SpatialDimPlot() panels for each image. Supports the same "auto" / "metadata" layout modes as GenerateSpatialFeatureMaps().

Usage

GenerateSpatialDimMaps(
  seurat_object,
  group_by_vars = NULL,
  layout_method = "auto",
  row_var = NULL,
  images_to_plot = NULL,
  remove_outliers = FALSE,
  outlier_prob = 0.01,
  size_override = NULL,
  uniform_size = FALSE,
  colors = NULL,
  output_dir = NULL,
  rowannsize = 16,
  imgalpha = 1,
  alpha = 1,
  object_name = "",
  group.by = NULL,
  cluster_colors = NULL
)

PlotSpatialDimPlots(
  seurat_object,
  group_by_vars = NULL,
  layout_method = "auto",
  row_var = NULL,
  images_to_plot = NULL,
  remove_outliers = FALSE,
  outlier_prob = 0.01,
  size_override = NULL,
  uniform_size = FALSE,
  colors = NULL,
  output_dir = NULL,
  rowannsize = 16,
  imgalpha = 1,
  alpha = 1,
  object_name = "",
  group.by = NULL,
  cluster_colors = NULL
)

Arguments

seurat_object

A Seurat object with spatial images.

group_by_vars

Character vector. Metadata columns to plot (one PDF per variable).

layout_method

Character. "auto" or "metadata". Default "auto".

row_var

Character or NULL. Slide-level metadata column for row grouping (required for "metadata" layout).

images_to_plot

Character vector or NULL. Images to include.

remove_outliers

Logical. Trim outlier cells. Default FALSE.

outlier_prob

Numeric. Quantile trim level. Default 0.01.

size_override

Scalar or named numeric list. A plain number applies to all images; a named list applies per image.

uniform_size

Logical. When TRUE all images receive the same auto-computed point size (the median across images), preventing tiny tissue fragments from getting huge dots. Default FALSE.

output_dir

Character or NULL. PDF output directory. Returns last plot when NULL.

rowannsize

Numeric. Row annotation text size. Default 16.

imgalpha

Numeric. Image transparency (0–1). Default 1.

alpha

Numeric. Point transparency (0–1). Default 1.

object_name

Character. Label for PDF filenames. Default "".

group.by

Alias for group_by_vars (preferred name).

cluster_colors

Named character vector. Colors for each group level. NULL uses Seurat defaults.

Value

Invisibly returns the last plot when output_dir = NULL.

Functions

  • PlotSpatialDimPlots(): Preferred short alias.

On this page
